title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: June 16, 2022
summary: June 16, 2022: Over the past week, the sea ice has now decreased by a slightly higher rate of 5.45% from the level on 06/09/2022 of 11.393 M km 2 to 10.772 M km 2 for this week.
